title: Transport Statistics Geography Portal Updated for November 2025

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The Department for Transport (DfT) has released a quarterly update to its Transport Statistics Geography Portal for November 2025. This update provides existing published official statistics in a geographical format, allowing for better analysis and understanding of transport trends across different regions.

The Transport Statistics Geography Portal supports informed decision-making in transport planning and policy, offering critical insights into the dynamics of transportation. Scottish aviation heritage is connected to this broader dataset, reflecting the vital role of aviation in enhancing connectivity across communities since the inter-war period.

sourceReferences.citationText: dft-press-office – Official Statistics: Transport Statistics Geography Portal: November 2025
